chapter_title: 2. Exemption process – students who have completed Year 10 and will participate full-time in approved education or training and/or employment
snippet: This section describes how to manage an attendance and enrolment exemption for students who have completed Year 10 and will participate in approved education or training, or employment on a full-time basis ( Ministerial Order 705 (PDF) External Link , Part 1) and who is responsible for each stage. complete the Exemption from School Application form (DOCX) External Link . Principals should then provide a copy of the completed Exemption from School Application form and any supporting documentation (such as letter of offer from an employer) to the student and regional office. If an exemption is granted, the school is encouraged to refer the student to the dedicated Victorian Early Leaver Connection Initiative Career Advice Service, outlined in Chapter 6 . Principals should note the following definitions: Full time basis means:
